verse_text: Jesus said to him, ' It is as you said. Nevertheless, I say to you, hereafter you will see the Son of Man sitting at the right hand of the Power, and coming on the clouds of heaven.'

links.context: Based on this law, the false witnesses against Jesus should have been put to death, for they wanted Him to die ([[MAT.26:59]]-66).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
